mapper.sql: MENU_ID, MENU_NM, MENU_TYPE, URL_PATH, LINKED_KEY, UPPER_ID, SORT_ORDR, USE_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID
mapper.select: SELECT FROM SGH_USER_MENU ORDER BY UPPER_ID, SORT_ORDR, MENU_ID
SELECT FROM SGH_USER_MENU WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY UPPER_ID, SORT_ORDR, MENU_ID
SELECT FROM SGH_USER_MENU WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' AND URL_PATH = #{urlPath} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SGH_USER_MENU (MENU_NM, MENU_TYPE, URL_PATH, LINKED_KEY, UPPER_ID, SORT_ORDR, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDUSR_ID) VALUES (#{menuNm}, #{menuType}, #{urlPath}, #{linkedKey}, #{upperId}, #{sortOrdr}, #{useAt}, #{frstRegisterId}, #{lastUpdusrId})
mapper.update: UPDATE SGH_USER_MENU SET MENU_NM = #{menuNm}, MENU_TYPE = #{menuType}, URL_PATH = #{urlPath}, LINKED_KEY = #{linkedKey}, UPPER_ID = #{upperId}, SORT_ORDR = #{sortOrdr}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
